custom_network_interface_name.description: Optional name for the network interface associated with the private endpoint.

name.description: The name of the private endpoint.

private_dns_zone_group.description: The name of the private DNS zone group.

private_service_connection.description: The name of the private service connection.
private_service_connection.type: list(object({name: string, private_connection_resource_id: string, subresource_names: list(string), is_manual_connection: bool, private_connection_resource_alias:string }))

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet where the private endpoint is located.

tags.description: Optional tags to assign to the private endpoint.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
